ogTitle: Eastwood vs Eba Anchorage: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eastwood and Eba Anchorage.
heading: Eastwood vs Eba Anchorage — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eastwood, South Australia and Eba Anchorage, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eba Anchorage has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Eastwood (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eastwood or Eba Anchorage safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eastwood has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Eba Anchorage scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eastwood scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Eba Anchorage scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eastwood or Eba Anchorage?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eba Anchorage has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
